summary: Focused c3 rows4_5_6 native-full stage isolation and c8 repeat confidence. All c3 partial native-branch diagnostics remained red while the broad per-row-full branch was green, so rowchunk2 remains the only green native-context-kernel c8 auto path. A confidence sweep also found intermittent c8 equality flakes in both rowchunk2 auto and explicit per-row fallback, so c8 evidence remains correctness-only and non-retained.

retained_claim_blockers: c3 full native branch remains red under every partial diagnostic tried; only broad per-row-full branch is green
c8 rowchunk2 auto and explicit per-row fallback both showed intermittent generated-token equality flakes in this confidence pass
c8 rowchunk2 remains native_caware_decode=false because row chunking is a diagnostic fallback

commands.c3_stage_matrix: HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_retained_bench.py --fixture /tmp/hipengine-prebench/fixtures/qwen36_paro_rows4_5_6_3x512_prompt_ids.json --batch-size 3 --batch-decode-full-attn-path native_batch --batch-decode-moe-path selected_c1 plus one diagnostic flag per case; perrow_full uses --batch-decode-full-attn-path per_row
commands.active_verify: active loop verify command at clean commit f7160b4 returned metric 137
commands.guard: HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 -m compileall -q hipengine tests scripts && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 pytest -q tests/test_generation_batch_scheduler.py tests/test_generation_qwen35_paro.py tests/test_qwen35_resident_batch_layout.py tests/test_kvcache_policy.py tests/test_kvcache_spans.py tests/test_server_api.py -q && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_correctness.py --rows 2 --json /tmp/hipengine-e2e-primitive-c2.json && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_correctness.py --rows 8 --json /tmp/hipengine-e2e-primitive-c8.json
